Features.introTitle: How our platform contributes to 10 sustainable development goals
Features.introText1: According to Article 9(4) of Regulation (EU) 2021/1060, projects from ERDF and JTF should be supported that are in line with the United Nations' goals for sustainable development and the Paris Agreement, as well as taking into account the principle of "avoiding significant harm".
Features.introText2: The United Nations have agreed on 17 goals for sustainable development (Sustainable Development Goals - SDGs) that are to be implemented by 2030. The goals are aimed at an equally ecologically, economically and socially sustainable development.
Features.title: POWERFUL FEATURES
Features.subtitle: Everything you need to transform your architectural visions into stunning visualizations
Features.healthDesc: The use of the platform reduces stress caused by long rendering times and working with local rendering. The accelerated rendering processes contribute to a better work-life balance, as architects can visualize their designs faster and reduce workload. Additionally, the project offers the possibility to develop projects more efficiently and with higher precision, contributing to better quality of construction projects and healthy, sustainable urban development.
Features.educationDesc: The project enables educational institutions to teach students digital visualization techniques and AI design. This prepares the next generation for the requirements of the architecture industry.
Features.equalityDesc: The project commits to discrimination-free development and use of its technology. Our initiative promotes equal opportunities by providing an accessible, intuitive platform for architects and planners regardless of gender, ethnic origin, religion, worldview, disability, age, or sexual orientation.
Features.cleanEnergyDesc: The project uses GPU-powered cloud rendering, which, despite higher energy consumption, is significantly more efficient in practice than traditional CPU rendering. Rendering times are reduced from hours or even days to just a few seconds, significantly reducing overall energy consumption. This technology not only optimizes energy consumption compared to conventional methods but also enables fast and resource-efficient use of modern visualization technologies.
Features.decentWorkDesc: By automating visualization processes, the project supports architects, urban planners, and creative professionals in increasing their productivity. This creates space for more creative and valuable tasks and promotes long-term sustainable economic growth. It contributes to the digital transformation of the architecture industry and creates new jobs in the field of AI and architecture, contributing to the promotion of a broad, inclusive economy.
Features.industryInfrastructureDesc: The project promotes digitization and innovation in the architecture industry by providing a cloud-based, GPU-supported platform for AI visualizations. This technology is not only relevant for architecture but can also be applied to other industries, such as urban planning or real estate. It promotes the development of resilient infrastructure and supports the creation of sustainable and future-proof innovation processes.
Features.inequalityDesc: The project contributes to reducing inequalities by opening access to advanced visualization technologies for small and medium-sized enterprises and freelancers. They benefit from the cost-effective, cloud-based solution that does not require expensive hardware. Smaller architecture firms can thus remain competitive and use the same innovative technologies as large companies.
Features.citiesMunicipalitiesDesc: The cloud-based solution reduces material consumption and enables environmentally friendly visualization of projects. This contributes to more sustainable production methods and minimizes energy consumption compared to traditional rendering processes.
Features.climateProtectionDesc: By optimizing rendering processes and reducing energy consumption, the project actively contributes to climate protection. The efficient use of cloud resources and the minimization of material consumption support sustainable practices and help reduce the ecological footprint of architectural visualization.

Articles.title: PRESS ARTICLES
Articles.companyEvolution: TYPUS.AI has gone through different stages fast and was formerly called YANUS / Präi

CreatorShowcase.title: CREATOR SHOWCASE
CreatorShowcase.subtitle: Discover how architects and designers are using Typus.AI to transform their workflows.

Footer.coFinancing: The project aims to develop central new features for the cloud-based AI visualization platform. This includes location-specific integration of 3D models into real environments, further processing of complete models, direct BIM integration, and AI-supported texture processing. An AI-compatible material catalog is also intended to enable the use of real materials and manufacturers. The automated conversion of 3D models into photorealistic renderings is promoted and allows intuitive editing directly in the browser. The prototype significantly improves the visualization process. For architects, this creates a new tool that enables efficient, flexible, and realistic visualizations in early design phases – including precise adjustments and location-accurate representation.

problem.subtitle: The reality in the industry:
problem.conclusion: And every image is billed individually.
problem.meaning1Desc: Days or weeks until the first draft.
problem.meaning2Desc: Tedious feedback loops via external portals.
problem.finalConclusion: For many architecture firms, this is too expensive and inflexible.

solution.title: The Image Flat Rate for Architecture Visualizations
solution.subtitle: With Typus, you get visualizations by subscription instead of per project. Instead of paying for each image individually, you can request as many visualizations as you want. A personal visualization specialist creates the images for you.
solution.step1Desc: Sketches, mockups, or 3D models - send us what you have.
solution.step2Title: Wir erstellen die Bilder mit KI
solution.step2Desc: Your personal specialist takes over the work.
solution.step3Desc: You will receive convincing results back in a very short time.

howItsPossible.title: How is this possible?
howItsPossible.p1: We do not work with classic rendering pipelines, which are often time-consuming and expensive. Instead, we use the latest possibilities of AI-supported visualization technology to present architecture precisely and atmospherically in the shortest possible time.
howItsPossible.p2: Our visualizations are not generated automatically, but are created by experienced visualizers - all with a background in architecture and architectural representation. In this way, we combine the speed of modern AI with the design understanding of architects.
howItsPossible.p4: High-quality architectural visualizations – faster, more flexible and significantly more efficient.

benefits.title: Like an external employee for visualizations
benefits.subtitle: Every firm gets a real person who creates the visualizations.
benefits.benefit1Desc: Direct line to your specialist, no ticket systems.
benefits.benefit2Desc: We get to know your style and implement it.
benefits.benefit3Desc: Uniform look for all your projects and competitions.
benefits.summary1: You dont work with an anonymous platform –
benefits.summary2: but with a dedicated visualization partner.
